text: Upon hearing a bard's song in the tavern, a swordsman appears before <chara_name>. He possesses the same key they hold and invites them to join him on his journey...
text_joined: Upon hearing a bard's song in the tavern, a swordsman appears before <chara_name>. He possesses the same key they hold and invites them to join him on his journey...

text: Near the arena, <chara_name> encounters Delvecchio, the syndicate member they clashed with in Victors Hollow and who is now part of the Bargello family. With no hesitation, he volunteers <chara_name> to take on the strongest of warriors...
text_joined: Near the arena, <chara_name> encounters Delvecchio, the syndicate member they clashed with in Victors Hollow and who is now part of the Bargello family. With no hesitation, he volunteers <chara_name> to take on the strongest of warriors...

text: Donescu—a nation ravaged by barbarians. Amidst the widespread devastation, a carefree and cheerful woman suddenly appears, as if to drive away the despair that envelops the region.
text_joined: Donescu—a nation ravaged by barbarians. Amidst the widespread devastation, a carefree and cheerful woman suddenly appears, as if to drive away the despair that envelops the region.

text: Celsus, the muscle hired by the tavern on the outskirts of Valore, renders even the most rowdy patrons speechless with his knife-throwing skills.
text_joined: Celsus, the muscle hired by the tavern on the outskirts of Valore, renders even the most rowdy patrons speechless with his knife-throwing skills.

text: Heidne decides to confront her father Vaughner, a slave trader known as the Man-Eating Miser, and makes her way to his hideout. Their long-standing feud is finally about to reach its conclusion.
text_joined: Heidne decides to confront her father Vaughner, a slave trader known as the Man-Eating Miser, and makes her way to his hideout. Their long-standing feud is finally about to reach its conclusion.

text: In the white sands of Sufrataljah dwell monsters unseen in other lands. There, <chara_name> meets a young man carrying an apothecary's bag.
text_joined: In the white sands of Sufrataljah dwell monsters unseen in other lands. There, <chara_name> meets a young man carrying an apothecary's bag.

text: A young boy has fallen ill in the snowy town of Emberglow. There, <chara_name> meets an apothecary who is prepared to do everything in her power to see that he is cured.
text_joined: A young boy has fallen ill in the snowy town of Emberglow. There, <chara_name> meets an apothecary who is prepared to do everything in her power to see that he is cured.

text: A woman arrives in the snowy town of Emberglow, donned in clothing unsuitable for the cold. Who is this mysterious figure and where did she come from...?
text_joined: A woman arrives in the snowy town of Emberglow, donned in clothing unsuitable for the cold. Who is this mysterious figure and where did she come from...?

text: In Cragspear, <chara_name> meets a familiar face from their childhood days: the cleric Pius. He wishes to accompany <chara_name> to visit their mother's grave. However...
text_joined: In Cragspear, <chara_name> meets a familiar face from their childhood days: the cleric Pius. He wishes to accompany <chara_name> to visit their mother's grave. However...

text: The scholar Xerc is willing to spend whatever it takes for his soulstone research, much to the dismay of his assistant, Athessa—the one responsible for procuring the funds. Now he has his sights set on a certain item at auction...
text_joined: The scholar Xerc is willing to spend whatever it takes for his soulstone research, much to the dismay of his assistant, Athessa—the one responsible for procuring the funds. Now he has his sights set on a certain item at auction...

text: In the Theatropolis library, a woman frantically wades through their collection of books, but what is it she is searching for...?
text_joined: In the Theatropolis library, a woman frantically wades through their collection of books, but what is it she is searching for...?

text: On a remote isle in the middle of a sea, a starving man longs for food...
text_joined: On a remote isle in the middle of a sea, a starving man longs for food...

text: The songstress Saoirse is ready to take the stage in the Theatropolis Amphitheatre. As the curtains are about to rise, she prompts <chara_name> to join her without any time to rehearse...
text_joined: The songstress Saoirse is ready to take the stage in the Theatropolis Amphitheatre. As the curtains are about to rise, she prompts <chara_name> to join her without any time to rehearse...

text: In a manse in Shepherds Rock, a young man lets out a troubled sigh. What could be bothering this well-dressed youth?
text_joined: In a manse in Shepherds Rock, a young man lets out a troubled sigh. What could be bothering this well-dressed youth?

text: Tressa, the daughter of a Rippletide merchant, is about to make a delivery for her father who has strained his back. <chara_name> decides to join her as her bodyguard as she prepares to make her way to Theatropolis.
text_joined: Tressa, the daughter of a Rippletide merchant, is about to make a delivery for her father who has strained his back. <chara_name> decides to join her as her bodyguard as she prepares to make her way to Theatropolis.

text: In Cragspear, a necklace said to ward off pickpockets is all the rage, with many believing in its effects without a doubt. Perhaps it is worth a close look.
text_joined: In Cragspear, a necklace said to ward off pickpockets is all the rage, with many believing in its effects without a doubt. Perhaps it is worth a close look.

text: An unlucky encounter has <chara_name> covered in poison. Just then, Alfyn appears and extends an invitation to his home in Clearbrook where he says he can offer treatment.
text_joined: An unlucky encounter has <chara_name> covered in poison. Just then, Alfyn appears and extends an invitation to his home in Clearbrook where he says he can offer treatment.

text: The hunter H'aanit loves nothing more than to hunt big game with her partner Linde—and Linde alone. But her master asks <chara_name> to accompany her to defeat a ferocious monster so that she may learn a valuable lesson.
text_joined: The hunter H'aanit loves nothing more than to hunt big game with her partner Linde—and Linde alone. But her master asks <chara_name> to accompany her to defeat a ferocious monster so that she may learn a valuable lesson.

text: The cleric Ophilia is the daughter of the archbishop of Flamesgrace and loves her family with all her heart. One day, a man claiming to be her real father appears before her...
text_joined: The cleric Ophilia is the daughter of the archbishop of Flamesgrace and loves her family with all her heart. One day, a man claiming to be her real father appears before her...

text: In the Atlasdam Flats, a middle-aged man is offering a reward for anyone who can defeat the ferocious monster that's taken the lives of many travelers...
text_joined: In the Atlasdam Flats, a middle-aged man is offering a reward for anyone who can defeat the ferocious monster that's taken the lives of many travelers...

text: Primrose is the most popular dancer in Sunshade, with many patrons drawn to her mysterious charm...
text_joined: Primrose is the most popular dancer in Sunshade, with many patrons drawn to her mysterious charm...

text: Scraps of paper are scattered around Orsterra. <chara_name> gathers them and puts them back together to discover what appears to be an invitation. <chara_name> decides to accept and soon finds themselves on a mysterious island...
text_joined: Scraps of paper are scattered around Orsterra. <chara_name> gathers them and puts them back together to discover what appears to be an invitation. <chara_name> decides to accept and soon finds themselves on a mysterious island...

text: It seems someone is living in the old shack in the North Theatropolis Plains. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.
text_joined: It seems someone is living in the old shack in the North Theatropolis Plains. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.

text: Rumor has it some former residents of Wishvale currently reside in Rippletide. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.
text_joined: Rumor has it some former residents of Wishvale currently reside in Rippletide. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.

text: Rumor has it some former residents of Wishvale currently reside in Cragspear. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.
text_joined: Rumor has it some former residents of Wishvale currently reside in Cragspear. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.

text: It seems a traveler visiting Ludo's shop heard a rumor about one of the town's survivors. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.
text_joined: It seems a traveler visiting Ludo's shop heard a rumor about one of the town's survivors. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.

text: Rumor has it some former residents of Wishvale currently reside in Shepherds Rock. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.
text_joined: Rumor has it some former residents of Wishvale currently reside in Shepherds Rock. Perhaps pursuing this lead will help facilitate the restoration of Wishvale.

text: In Rippletide, a man standing on the pier looks forlornly at the damaged ship before him. What do his somber eyes see...and feel?
text_joined: In Rippletide, a man standing on the pier looks forlornly at the damaged ship before him. What do his somber eyes see...and feel?

text: A mysterious voice echoes throughout the Heavens and guides <chara_name> to the place where the rings were once sealed.
text_joined: A mysterious voice echoes throughout the Heavens and guides <chara_name> to the place where the rings were once sealed.

text: Restoration efforts wind down as Wishvale is transformed into a bustling town. One day, a gentleman visiting the town proposes a plan for a new facility—a monster arena.
text_joined: Restoration efforts wind down as Wishvale is transformed into a bustling town. One day, a gentleman visiting the town proposes a plan for a new facility—a monster arena.

text: After escaping from slavers, a young boy named Phil begs for someone to rescue his father whom he left behind. Save the young boy's father and reunite the family.
text_joined: After escaping from slavers, a young boy named Phil begs for someone to rescue his father whom he left behind. Save the young boy's father and reunite the family.

text: The inscrutable tower has finally been discovered. What mysteries lie within?
text_joined: The inscrutable tower has finally been discovered. What mysteries lie within?

text: Ludo once had a love with whom he parted ways after a huge quarrel. Listen to Karan's story, and aim to learn more about her.
text_joined: Ludo once had a love with whom he parted ways after a huge quarrel. Listen to Karan's story, and aim to learn more about her.

text: It seems Delitia's brother has been spotted in Atlasdam. Visit the town and seek him out.
text_joined: It seems Delitia's brother has been spotted in Atlasdam. Visit the town and seek him out.

text: In Atlasdam, Xerc's assistant, Athessa, has made arrangements to allow the professor to perform his research on the gargantuan soulstone. Will her hard work pay off?
text_joined: In Atlasdam, Xerc's assistant, Athessa, has made arrangements to allow the professor to perform his research on the gargantuan soulstone. Will her hard work pay off?

text: After deciphering an ancient text, Alexia makes her way to Berecain to uncover the truth...
text_joined: After deciphering an ancient text, Alexia makes her way to Berecain to uncover the truth...

text: Sazantos visits Agapea to cleanse his dark blade, the Demon Blade Fisteralda. However, he learns the ritual requires them to call upon the Sacred Flame...
text_joined: Sazantos visits Agapea to cleanse his dark blade, the Demon Blade Fisteralda. However, he learns the ritual requires them to call upon the Sacred Flame...

text: Bishop Tarset, who was discovered to have been colluding with Tytos, is imprisoned for his crime. One day, he is visited by his old friend Pius...
text_joined: Bishop Tarset, who was discovered to have been colluding with Tytos, is imprisoned for his crime. One day, he is visited by his old friend Pius...

text: A gang of pirates in the Middlesea is causing trouble for local merchants. Go with Viator to take care of the problem.
text_joined: A gang of pirates in the Middlesea is causing trouble for local merchants. Go with Viator to take care of the problem.

text: To re-establish an independent government in Donescu, Richard believes King Dudek's nephew is key and asks <chara_name> to find him. Search for clues to his whereabouts with Carinda, who has ties with the town in which he currently resides.
text_joined: To re-establish an independent government in Donescu, Richard believes King Dudek's nephew is key and asks <chara_name> to find him. Search for clues to his whereabouts with Carinda, who has ties with the town in which he currently resides.

text: A fallen man roams the slums of Hell's Cragspear, while a woman in the slums of Cragspear is tormented by nightmares. There seems to be some sort of connection, but what?
text_joined: A fallen man roams the slums of Hell's Cragspear, while a woman in the slums of Cragspear is tormented by nightmares. There seems to be some sort of connection, but what?

text: In Valore, a young hunter chats with Celsus, an old friend of his late father. It seems there was bad blood between the boy and his father, a former syndicate member...
text_joined: In Valore, a young hunter chats with Celsus, an old friend of his late father. It seems there was bad blood between the boy and his father, a former syndicate member...

text: The people of Donescu have experienced great suffering and loss, and many have lost their will to live. Surely there is something that can be done to lift their spirits.
text_joined: The people of Donescu have experienced great suffering and loss, and many have lost their will to live. Surely there is something that can be done to lift their spirits.

text: The Asul clan pride themselves on living in harmony with nature. Macy, on the other hand, wishes they would allow her to treat them with her medicine...
text_joined: The Asul clan pride themselves on living in harmony with nature. Macy, on the other hand, wishes they would allow her to treat them with her medicine...

text: Within the remains of Tatloch's ship, which was destroyed in the Middlesea, there is said to be a valuable treasure...
text_joined: Within the remains of Tatloch's ship, which was destroyed in the Middlesea, there is said to be a valuable treasure...

text: In Valore, a distiller of brandy looks to sell his last cask to someone who appreciates fine liquor.
text_joined: In Valore, a distiller of brandy looks to sell his last cask to someone who appreciates fine liquor.

text: A compassionate daughter cares for her father, who was left physically disabled. He longs for the return of his son who left town to become a trader.
text_joined: A compassionate daughter cares for her father, who was left physically disabled. He longs for the return of his son who left town to become a trader.

text: Tickets to Auguste's memorial play are sold out, leaving one woman despondent. Where could she possibly get her hands on one now?
text_joined: Tickets to Auguste's memorial play are sold out, leaving one woman despondent. Where could she possibly get her hands on one now?

text: A master fisherman is in search of an apprentice, but his high standards make for slim pickings...
text_joined: A master fisherman is in search of an apprentice, but his high standards make for slim pickings...

text: A wealthy gourmand is in search of a great chef. Who can cook up the eggs of a rare bird in a dish that's a feast for the eyes as well as the stomach?
text_joined: A wealthy gourmand is in search of a great chef. Who can cook up the eggs of a rare bird in a dish that's a feast for the eyes as well as the stomach?

text: A man has been trying to reel in the big 'un for years. It seems a special kind of bait is required for this special catch.
text_joined: A man has been trying to reel in the big 'un for years. It seems a special kind of bait is required for this special catch.

text: <chara_name> obtains an item whose purpose is unknown. Is there anyone who would want such a peculiar ornament...?
text_joined: <chara_name> obtains an item whose purpose is unknown. Is there anyone who would want such a peculiar ornament...?

text: A sheep farmer has lost his new herd of alpacas. Help the man round them up to put his mind at ease.
text_joined: A sheep farmer has lost his new herd of alpacas. Help the man round them up to put his mind at ease.

text: A Knight Ardante is having a difficult time shoveling the icy snow along the pilgrimage roads. Perhaps he could use some help.
text_joined: A Knight Ardante is having a difficult time shoveling the icy snow along the pilgrimage roads. Perhaps he could use some help.

text: A man is eager to collect all ten arena medals awarded only to the greatest of gladiators. Who possesses the final, precious medal of his collection?
text_joined: A man is eager to collect all ten arena medals awarded only to the greatest of gladiators. Who possesses the final, precious medal of his collection?

text: In Grandport, a forlorn cat meows woefully as she longs to see a certain someone.
text_joined: In Grandport, a forlorn cat meows woefully as she longs to see a certain someone.

text: Three books belonging to the Atlasdam library are overdue. The librarian, Mercedes, wants them returned and asks <chara_name> to track them down.
text_joined: Three books belonging to the Atlasdam library are overdue. The librarian, Mercedes, wants them returned and asks <chara_name> to track them down.

text: The frequent earthquakes occurring in Berecain have one man anxious and uneasy. Perhaps tracking down the cause will put his mind at ease.
text_joined: The frequent earthquakes occurring in Berecain have one man anxious and uneasy. Perhaps tracking down the cause will put his mind at ease.

text: An Important Quality for a King
text_joined: An Important Quality for a King
